description: The Alfieri clan was a Neapolitan Camorra clan operating in the north-east of Naples, with its sphere of influence in Saviano and Nola. Founded by Carmine Alfieri after his father's murder in 1952, the clan became a founding member of the Nuova Famiglia alliance to counter the Nuova Camorra Organizzata. It expanded its power in the 1980s but declined after Carmine Alfieri became a pentito in 1993. The clan is now defunct.
